title: Daedalacanthus purpurascens

This family is commonly known as the acanthus family, comprising flowering plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. The Acanthaceae family includes around 2,000 species, with Daedalacanthus purpurascens being one of the less commonly known species within this group. Daedalacanthus purpurascens is also classified within the order Lamiales, which includes plants with similar characteristics and growth habits. Further classification of Daedalacanthus purpurascens includes its placement within the subfamily Acanthoideae.
